title: NPV: If a firm has total cash inflows of 500000 and...
summary: Calculate the NPV of a project by discounting expected cash flows at the appropriate discount rate.
prompt: If a firm has total cash inflows of $500,000 and total cash outflows of $300,000 over a project’s lifetime, what is the NPV assuming a discount rate of 10%?
solution: NPV = Total Cash Inflows - Total Cash Outflows. Here, NPV = $500,000 - $300,000 = $200,000.
